'''Dom-Bradden''', also known as '''Bradden''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was the home planet of the [[Affytechan]]s, a race of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] botanicals.

==History==
In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] stationed several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on the world to be picked up by the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. After the ship was temporarily disabled by [[Callista Ming]], its arrival was delayed until [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], by which point the stormtrooper contingent stationed on the planet was long dead. In their place, the ''Eye'' abducted a number of Affytechans whom they attempted to brainwash into being [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Navy troopers]].

{{Planet-stub}}
